title: High Version Vanilla PVP
description: Dominating PVP just got easier! Experience crystal - clear combat with our pack's sharp textures, transparent interface, and ore outlines . Enjoy the PVP Resources!
body:
### **Features**
- Transparent GUI
- Low Fire
- Mineral Outlines
- Colored Bow & Crossbow Stages
- Transparent Pumpkin

### **Description**
Elevate your Minecraft PVP game! This pack offers sharp textures, high performance, and combat - friendly UI tweaks. Ready for any server battle. Download now!
### **Showcase**
![showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/158630b534a6169ff4130182ac308151b7615f28_0.webp)
